footer.tagline: Hundreds of opportunities for every Ivorian student. Free, always. We're in this together.
footer.madeWith: Made with ❤️ for students of Côte d'Ivoire

home.badge: Akwaba! Free for all Ivorian students
home.heroSubtitle: Hundreds of scholarships and universities from around the world, freely accessible to every student in Côte d'Ivoire.
home.availableSubtitle: Verified opportunities waiting for you. Don't miss your chance.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to turn your ambitions into reality.
home.step1Desc: Fill in your profile in minutes with your academic background and goals.
home.step2Desc: Explore hundreds of scholarships and universities that match your profile.
home.step3Desc: Submit your applications directly through our platform and track their progress.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to start your journey to excellence?
home.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of Ivorian students who have already found their scholarship through Mibegnon.
home.ctaTagline: Ça va aller, on est ensemble. 🇨🇮

about.title: Every Ivorian student deserves a chance
about.intro: Mibegnon was born from a simple belief: information about scholarships should not be reserved for those with connections or money.
about.value1Desc: Mibegnon is and will always be 100% free for every Ivorian student.
about.value2Desc: Every scholarship and university listed is verified.
about.value3Desc: We understand the challenges faced by students in Côte d'Ivoire.
about.value4Desc: No matter where you come from, your intelligence and hard work deserve a chance.
about.founderBio: Ivorian student in Master of Information Management and Systems.
about.tagline: Ça va aller, on est ensemble. 🇨🇮
about.contactNote: For any questions, contact us at contact@mibegnon.com

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: A question, suggestion, or bug? We're listening.
contact.responseText: We usually respond within 48 hours. We're here for you!
contact.submitTitle: Want to suggest a scholarship or university?
contact.submitDesc: Send us the details at bourses@mibegnon.com and we'll review it.

soumettre.title: Submit a scholarship
soumettre.subtitle: Know a scholarship that isn't on Mibegnon yet? Send us the details.
soumettre.successMessage: Your submission has been received. We'll review it and add it as soon as possible.
